overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character walking through a foggy, gas-lit historic town at night. The character traverses muddy cobblestone streets lined with wooden buildings, passes through a grassy park area with oak trees, and encounters a trolley on the main thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with wooden storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the muddy cobblestone street past wooden buildings with gas lamps and commercial signs

entered.detail: two-story wooden buildings with balconies and lit windows lining the left side of the street
cast iron street lamps emitting warm yellow light along the road
illuminated signs for BEAM and BEER mounted on the building facades
tall wooden telegraph or electrical pole on the right side of the street
wet cobblestone street surface reflecting the gas lamp light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy, gas-lit historic street at night. Wooden buildings with balconies and commercial signs line the left side, while a utility pole stands on the right. The muddy cobblestone road reflects the warm yellow light from the street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between built street and parkland

events.description: wooden buildings on left recede as grassy area with trees appears on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing down the road as the built environment transitions to more open space with vegetation

entered.detail: wooden picket fence running along the right side of the path
grassy area replacing the cobblestone on the right side of the road
large oak trees with Spanish moss becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the dense commercial buildings into a more open transitional area. A wooden fence and grassy verge appear on the right, while the wooden buildings recede into the distance on the left. Large oak trees become visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: park or garden area with large oak trees

events.description: entering grassy park area with dense oak trees and approaching a stone gate entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the grassy park area with large trees, approaching a gated stone entrance

entered.detail: stone pillars with mounted lamps marking a gated entrance
wrought iron gate between the stone pillars
large oak trees heavy with Spanish moss creating a canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grassy park area dominated by large oak trees draped with Spanish moss. The lighting becomes darker and more natural as the character approaches a stone gate entrance with iron doors and lamp-topped pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic town square with brick buildings

events.description: passing through the stone gate back onto paved cobblestone streets
turning right onto a wider main street with brick buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: passing through the gate and turning onto a wider street lined with brick townhouses and street lamps

entered.detail: multi-story brick buildings with shuttered windows lining the left side
multi-story brick buildings with balconies on the right side
raised paved sidewalk running along the right side of the street
regularly spaced gas street lamps illuminating the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the stone gate back onto paved streets, transitioning from the park to an urban square. The scene opens into a wider intersection with brick townhouses on both sides and raised sidewalks. The character turns right onto the main thoroughfare.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with trolley tracks

events.description: trolley streetcar approaches from the distance and passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: walking down the main cobblestone street as a trolley passes by on the left side

notable_agents.action: trolley streetcar moving along tracks, passing the character on the left side

entered.detail: iron archway sign reading BUTCHER SQUARE spanning the right side of the street
metal trolley tracks embedded in the cobblestone street

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the wide main street, passing under the Butcher Square arch sign. A trolley streetcar approaches from the foggy distance and passes by on the left, moving along its tracks. The street remains lined with brick buildings and gas lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gas-lit urban street into a dark, atmospheric parkland. It begins by traversing a muddy cobblestone road lined with wooden commercial buildings and balconies, where warm yellow light from street lamps reflects off the wet ground. As the character moves forward, the dense architecture recedes and the scene opens into a transitional area marked by a wooden fence and a grassy verge. The environment then shifts into a park dominated by large oak trees draped in Spanish moss, causing the lighting to fade from artificial gold to a deeper, natural darkness. Finally, the camera advances through the greenery toward a stone gate entrance featuring iron doors and lamp-topped pillars.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from a quiet park into the bustling, gas-lit atmosphere of a historic urban center. It begins by passing through a stone gate and onto paved streets, where the environment opens into a wide intersection lined with brick townhouses and raised sidewalks. As the character turns right onto the main thoroughfare, the scene expands into a broad street flanked by glowing gas lamps and traditional architecture. The camera then follows the path under the Butcher Square arch sign just as a trolley streetcar emerges from the foggy distance to glide past on its tracks.
